metrics.name: snapshot_count
metrics.description: Number of filtered market snapshots evaluated

metrics.name: signal_count
metrics.description: Number of filtered snapshots with positive gross edge

metrics.name: alert_count
metrics.description: Number of filtered snapshots that triggered an alert

metrics.name: avg_net_edge
metrics.description: Average net edge across filtered snapshots with a computed net edge

metrics.name: max_net_edge
metrics.description: Maximum net edge across filtered snapshots

metrics.name: avg_seconds_to_expiry
metrics.description: Average seconds to expiry across filtered snapshots

metrics.name: too_close_to_expiry_count
metrics.description: How many filtered snapshots were blocked only or partly because they were too close to expiry
